title: Accounts
entity_create_cta: Can't find yours? Add a new bank
entity_created: Bank created. We'll review it soon.

new_entity.title: Add a new bank
new_entity.name: Bank name
new_entity.hint: Up to 30 characters. We'll review it and add its logo.

fields.opening_balance_hint: Account balance before its first movement. The current balance is computed as opening balance + sum of movements.
fields.logo_hint: Transparent PNG, SVG or JPG (max 1 MB). You can also paste a URL.
fields.logo_invalid_type: The file must be an image.

debit_warning.title: Debit cards aren't created as accounts
debit_warning.body: A debit card's transactions already show up in the checking account it's linked to. If you also created it as its own account, every expense would be counted twice and distort your totals and charts. That's why debit cards can't be created: their transactions are imported inside the checking account.

empty.title: No accounts
empty.description: Add your first account or card to start importing transactions.

delete_dialog.title: Delete "{{name}}"
delete_dialog.archive_hint: The account is hidden across the app, but its transactions are kept and still count toward the Dashboard and charts.
delete_dialog.delete_all: Delete the account and its transactions
delete_dialog.delete_all_hint: Permanently removes the account along with all its transactions and imports.
delete_dialog.confirm_warning: All transactions for this account will be permanently deleted. This will affect your charts, balances and Dashboard totals, along with other useful insights based on your history. This action cannot be undone.
